title: VickyEs Kill Counter
description: Adds Kill counters and teams to the game for battle royale purposes.
body: This is a mod that comes from the 3-set pack of which The Starter Kits, ReLooter, and this are included. It covers the K/D/A aspect of the pack with a team system. The team system allows for friendly fire, team tab visiblity, and guild logos. Stay tuned; there's more to come.
